answer_en:
Iliopsoas m.
Origin: Iliac crest, iliac fossa, and ala of sacrum (iliacus); transverse processes of L1-L5, and vertebral bodies of T12-L5 (psoas major)
Insertion: Lesser trochanter of femur

details: Origin: Iliac crest, iliac fossa, and ala of sacrum (iliacus); transverse processes of L1-L5, and vertebral bodies of T12-L5 (psoas major)
